close_reason: Removed Worker GenServer layer, now uses Task.Supervisor directly. Worker module reduced from 109 to 73 lines.
description:
Current flow: Manager → WorkerPool → Worker GenServer → Task.async → Job.perform

Worker is restart: :temporary (doesn't use GenServer restart capability). Task crash is caught manually anyway.

Fix: Execute jobs directly as Tasks from Manager, removing the GenServer layer.
title: Simplify Worker to direct Task execution
